languages.text: {n}Арбитр хмурится, после чего спокойным, предостерегающим голосом сообщает:{/n} "Воль... {name} фон Валанциус, с этого момента все ваши права, свободы, доходы, владения и статус в любой момент могут быть поставлены под сомнение". {n}Несколько секунд он молчит.{/n} "Не мной, но все же... стоит кому-то захотеть положить вам конец..."

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] {n}Арбитр хмурится, после чего спокойным, предостерегающим голосом сообщает:{/n} "Ваша Св... {name} фон Валанциус, с этого момента все ваши права, свободы, доходы, владения и статус в любой момент могут быть поставлены под сомнение". {n}Несколько секунд он молчит.{/n} "Не мной, но все же... стоит кому-то захотеть положить вам конец..."

{n}Арбитр хмурится, после чего спокойным, предостерегающим голосом сообщает:{/n} "Ваша Св... {name} фон Валанциус, с этого момента все ваши права, свободы, доходы, владения и статус в любой момент могут быть поставлены под сомнение". {n}Несколько секунд он молчит.{/n} "Не мной, но все же... стоит кому-то захотеть положить вам конец..."
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."
languages.original_text: {n}Арбитр хмурится, после чего спокойным, предостерегающим голосом сообщает:{/n} "Воль... {name} фон Валанциус, с этого момента все ваши права, свободы, доходы, владения и статус в любой момент могут быть поставлены под сомнение". {n}Несколько секунд он молчит.{/n} "Не мной, но все же... стоит кому-то захотеть положить вам конец..."

{n}The Arbiter frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Your Lor... {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

{n}The Arbiter frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "{mf|Your Lor...|Your La…} {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

{n}The Arbiter frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "{mf|Your Lor...|Your La…} {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

{n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

{n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

languages.text: {n}El Arbitrator frunce el ceño, después habla en tono tranquilo de advertencia.{/n} «Comer... {name} von Valancius, desde este momento, todos sus derechos, libertades, ingresos, posesiones y estatus pueden quedar en entredicho en cualquier momento». {n}Guarda unos segundos de silencio.{/n} «No seré yo quien lo haga, pero... si alguien quisiera acabar con usted...».
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Arbitrator frunce el ceño, después habla en tono tranquilo de advertencia.{/n} «Comer... {name} von Valancius, desde este momento, todos sus derechos, libertades, ingresos, posesiones y estatus pueden quedar en entredicho en cualquier momento». {n}Guarda unos segundos de silencio.{/n} «No seré yo quien lo haga, pero... si alguien quisiera acabar con usted...».

languages.text: {n}法务官皱起眉头，随后以一种平静而满含警告的语气开口。{/n}“行商——{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯大人，自这一刻起，您所有的权利、自由、收入、领地及地位，随时都可能受到质疑。”{n}他沉默了片刻。{/n}“并非来自于我，然而……若有人意图置您于死地……”
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}法务官皱起眉头，随后以一种平静而满含警告的语气开口。{/n}“行商——{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯大人，自这一刻起，您所有的权利、自由、收入、领地及地位，随时都可能受到质疑。”{n}他沉默了片刻。{/n}“并非来自于我，然而……若有人意图置您于死地……”

languages.text: {n}L'arbitrator fronce les sourcils, puis s'exprime sur un ton calme, lourd d'avertissement :{/n} « Libre-m... {name} von Valancius, à compter de ce moment, tous vos droits, vos libertés, revenus, possessions et statuts sont susceptibles d'être remis en question. {n}Il garde le silence quelques instants.{/n} Pas par moi, mais... Si quelqu'un souhaitait votre chute... »
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'arbitrator fronce les sourcils, puis s'exprime sur un ton calme, lourd d'avertissement :{/n} « Libre-m... {name} von Valancius, à compter de ce moment, tous vos droits, vos libertés, revenus, possessions et statuts sont susceptibles d'être remis en question. {n}Il garde le silence quelques instants.{/n} Pas par moi, mais... Si quelqu'un souhaitait votre chute... »

languages.text: {n}Yargıcı kaşlarını çatıp sonra sakin, uyarıcı bir tonda konuşuyor.{/n} "Hür... {name} von Valancius... Şu andan itibaren tüm haklarınız, özgürlükleriniz, gelirleriniz, mülkleriniz ve statünüz her an sorgulanabilir." {n}Birkaç saniye sessiz kalıyor.{/n} "Benim tarafımdan değil ama yine de... Eğer birisi işinizi bitirmek isterse..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Yargıcı kaşlarını çatıp sonra sakin, uyarıcı bir tonda konuşuyor.{/n} "Hür... {name} von Valancius... Şu andan itibaren tüm haklarınız, özgürlükleriniz, gelirleriniz, mülkleriniz ve statünüz her an sorgulanabilir." {n}Birkaç saniye sessiz kalıyor.{/n} "Benim tarafımdan değil ama yine de... Eğer birisi işinizi bitirmek isterse..."

languages.text: {n}Der Arbitrator runzelt die Stirn und sagt mit ruhiger, warnender Stimme:{/n} "Frei... {name} von Valancius, von diesem Moment an können alle Eure Rechte, Freiheiten, Einkünfte, Besitzungen und Titel jederzeit infrage gestellt werden." {n}Er schweigt einige Sekunden.{/n} "Nicht durch mich, aber dennoch ... will immer noch jemand Euren Tod ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Arbitrator runzelt die Stirn und sagt mit ruhiger, warnender Stimme:{/n} "Frei... {name} von Valancius, von diesem Moment an können alle Eure Rechte, Freiheiten, Einkünfte, Besitzungen und Titel jederzeit infrage gestellt werden." {n}Er schweigt einige Sekunden.{/n} "Nicht durch mich, aber dennoch ... will immer noch jemand Euren Tod ..."

languages.text: {n}裁定者は眉をしかめ、それから落ち着いた警告の口調で話す。{/n}"Rog-{name} フォン・ヴァランシウス、この瞬間から、あなたのすべての権利、自由、収入、所有物、地位はいつでも問題にされる可能性がある。"{n}彼は数秒間沈黙する。{/n}"私にではないが、それでも......誰かがあなたに終止符を打ちたいと望むなら......"
languages.original_text: {n}The Arbitrator frowns, then speaks in a calm, warning tone.{/n} "Rog— {name} von Valancius, from this moment forward, all your rights, freedoms, incomes, holdings, and status may be called into question at any time." {n}He is silent for a few seconds.{/n} "Not by me, but still... should someone wish to put an end to you..."

traits.locale_text: {n}裁定者は眉をしかめ、それから落ち着いた警告の口調で話す。{/n}"Rog-{name} フォン・ヴァランシウス、この瞬間から、あなたのすべての権利、自由、収入、所有物、地位はいつでも問題にされる可能性がある。"{n}彼は数秒間沈黙する。{/n}"私にではないが、それでも......誰かがあなたに終止符を打ちたいと望むなら......"
